name: Clint

passive.name: Double Shot
passive.description: After each skill cast, Clint's next Basic Attack within 4s penetrates a line of enemies, dealing 50( +120% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). This damage can trigger attack effects, and the part affected by Physical Attack can Crit.
passive.tips: This is a very strong passive, and helps with sustainability in the laning phase, as well as reaching squishier back-row heroes.

skill1.name: Quick Draw
skill1.description: Clint fires 5 bullets in quick succession in the target direction, each dealing 250( +85% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the enemy hit. The bullets will spread evenly across enemies in a fan-shaped area. Enemies hit by multiple bullets will take less damage after the first bullet.
skill1.tips: This skill has a powerful effect, but is relatively situational and has a small range. Use it to limit enemy movement and trigger Clint's passive.

skill2.name: Trapping Recoil
skill2.description: Clint shoots a trap net in the target direction, slightly jumping back while dealing 140( +30% Total Physical Attack)( +150% Total Magic Power) (Physical Damage) to the first enemy hit and immobilizing them for 1.2s. Successfully hitting an enemy reduces the cooldown of this skill by 40%.
skill2.tips: Clint can fire this backwards when being chased, and can also use it to jump through walls. Has a wide range of applications.

ultimate.name: Grenade Bombardment
ultimate.description: Clint launches a grenade in the target direction that explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing 280( +100% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and slowing them by 25% for 1.2s. Clint gains a grenade charge every 12s (up to 5).
ultimate.tips: High single-target damage and can be used frequently. Make sure you're stocked up on grenades before entering a team fight!

matchupSystem.strongAgainstReason: Clint counters heroes with comparatively shorter range like Moskov and Miya thanks to the superior range of his skills and Basic Attacks.
matchupSystem.weakAgainstReason: Clint is countered by Marksmen with burst damage like Melissa and Karrie since he lacks burst in the early and mid game to trade blows with them.
matchupSystem.synergyReason: Clint works best with Supportsthat can enhance his kiting ability, such as Rafaela and Angela.

mechanicNote: Clint adalah marksman dengan DPS tinggi yang menjadi win condition utama di late game.

powerCurve.description: Clint is oppressive early because his passive-enhanced Basic Attacks after every skill give repeated high burst/poke to win trades and punish last-hits. He still spikes mid with a couple damage items for pickoffs, but relative impact drops late versus full-build hypercarries since he’s more burst-oriented than sustained DPS.

combos.name: TEAMFIGHT
combos.description: In teamfights, use Clint's Ultimate and enhanced Basic Attacks to whittle down enemies from a distance. Once the enemy is weakened from the constant bombardment, use Clint's 1st Skill, Basic Attack, 2nd Skill, and Basic Attack combo to finish them off.

combos.name: LANING
combos.description: In the laning phase, Clint should use his 1st Skill followed by an enhanced Basic Attack, then his 2nd Skill followed by another enhanced Basic Attack. This combo maximizes his damage, immobilizes the target, and moves Clint out of harm's way.
